functions.name: get_leads
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Leads from Salesforce. Returns lead name, company, email, phone, status, and lead source.

functions.name: create_lead
functions.description: Create a new Lead in Salesforce. Requires last_name and company at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: update_lead
functions.description: Update an existing Lead in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.

functions.name: get_opportunities
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Opportunities from Salesforce. Returns opportunity name, account, stage, amount, close date, and probability.

functions.name: create_opportunity
functions.description: Create a new Opportunity in Salesforce. Requires name, stage, and close_date at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: update_opportunity
functions.description: Update an existing Opportunity in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.

functions.name: get_incidents
functions.description: Retrieve the latest incidents from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' incidents (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: get_requests
functions.description: Retrieve the latest service requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' requests (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.

functions.name: get_request_items
functions.description: Retrieve request items for a specific service request. request_sys_id is the sys_id of the parent sc_request record. Called from the widget when expanding a request row.

functions.name: create_incident
functions.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4), category.

functions.name: create_request
functions.description: Create a new service request in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4). Does not create request items.

functions.name: update_incident
functions.description: Update an existing incident in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable fields: description, priority.

functions.name: update_request
functions.description: Update an existing service request in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: approval (not requested, requested, approved, rejected).

functions.name: update_request_item
functions.description: Update an existing request item in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: quantity.

functions.name: get_purchase_orders
functions.description: Fetch the latest purchase orders from SAP S/4HANA. Returns PO number, supplier, purchasing org, date, and deletion code.

functions.name: get_business_partners
functions.description: Fetch business partners from SAP S/4HANA. Returns partner ID, full name, category, and organization name.

functions.name: get_materials
functions.description: Fetch materials master data from SAP S/4HANA. Returns product ID, type, group, and base unit.

functions.name: create_purchase_order
functions.description: Create a new Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA. Requires supplier and purchasing_org. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: update_purchase_order
functions.description: Update an existing Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA by its PO number. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.

functions.name: get_material_details
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific material from SAP S/4HANA. Returns all available fields for the material.

functions.name: get_emails
functions.description: Get the latest marketing emails from HubSpot with performance stats (sent, opened, clicked, bounced).

functions.name: get_contacts
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Contacts from HubSpot. Returns contact name, email, phone, company, and lifecycle stage.

functions.name: create_contact
functions.description: Create a new Contact in HubSpot. Requires email at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: update_contact
functions.description: Update an existing Contact in HubSpot by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.

functions.name: get_companies
functions.description: Get the 5 most recent Companies from HubSpot. Returns company name, domain, industry, city, and phone.

functions.name: create_company
functions.description: Create a new Company in HubSpot. Requires name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 companies.

functions.name: update_company
functions.description: Update an existing Company in HubSpot by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 companies.
